reviews.comment:
Malísima atención, sobre todo en el bar. La señora que atiende es bastante maltratadora Y mezquina.
Una pena, habiendo tanta gente con ganas de trabajar y servir bien, que elijan a este tipo de empleado.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, especially at the bar. The woman who works there is quite rude and mean.
It's a shame that, with so many people eager to work and provide good service, they choose this kind of employee.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNFktZEF3EAE

reviews.comment:
malísima atención, 1hs para cargar combustible con 4 vehículos delante. el full lentisimio, la máquina de agua 30 min para calentar, 10 personas esperando y te traga todas las monedas. Todo mal. gente esperando en todos lados.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, it took an hour to fill up with four cars ahead of me. The pump was incredibly slow, the water machine took 30 minutes to heat up, there were 10 people waiting, and it swallowed all my coins. Everything was bad. People were waiting everywhere.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzb2IybVBBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala. La atención es pesima. Tardas en promedio una hora para cargar combustible y la gente que te atiende lo hace sin ganas. Un desastre y una pena.

(Translated by Google)
Very bad. The service is terrible. It takes an average of one hour to fill up, and the people who help you do it without any enthusiasm. A disaster and a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzb2UyeWNREAE

reviews.comment:
Terrible estación de servicios!! pésima atención, pésimo servicio, mala predisposición, lentos. Nada bueno para decir de este lugar. Nunca tuve un servicio tan malo como este

(Translated by Google)
Terrible gas station! Terrible service, terrible customer service, rude attitude, slow. Nothing good to say about this place. I've never had service as bad as this.
